assertions.text: One-paragraph overview followed by coverage by frame

assertion_results.note: Overview paragraph followed by 3 frame sections: infrastructure/economic, consumer impact, corporate/financial
Outlets grouped by how they framed the story, not listed sequentially
Outlier: regional newspaper unique local perspective. Gap: no airline workers quoted; no passenger rights angle.
Grouped by frame: celebration, criticism, comparison
Gaps noted: no accessibility data, no user feedback from residents
Overview paragraph captures full range across 5 outlets and 4 countries
Organised by: diplomatic realignment frame, bilateral relations frame, economic/trade frame, EU coordination frame, geopolitical decoupling frame
Outlier: Chinese state media perspective rarely included in Western roundups. Gap: Italian domestic politics barely covered; no Italian opposition party voice.
